title: Multi-Tab Approval Queue
description: ARCHETYPE: queue_workflow. Build a web app page at '/cro' with an app shell. The main content MUST use `page header` with `subtitle` and `actions:` plus a `tab strip` with at least 3 routed tabs. The sidebar should still use explicit `nav section` / `nav item` syntax.
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

# Build one CRO approval queue page with app_layout, app_sidebar, app_main, and app_content.
# The content area must use page header + subtitle + actions, then tab strip.

page 'CRO Review' at '/cro':
  pending_count = 5
  approved_count = 12
  escalated_count = 2

  # App shell here

steps.name: Uses page header with subtitle and actions
